\tzpentry{ID3790}{Phase Angle Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3790 introduces Phase Angle Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \dot{\theta}_i = \omega_i + \sum_{\substack{j=1\\ j\neq i}}^{N} K_{ij}\,\sin\!\big(\theta_j-\theta_i\big) + K_{J,i}\,\sin\!\big(\theta_J-\theta_i\big) - \gamma\big(\theta_i-\Omega(r_i)\,t\big), \label{eq:theta_dynamics} \end{equation}
